attributes.description: Alerts when `ibmmq_qmgr_log_file_system_free_space_percentage < 10`. Log filesystem exhaustion halts all transactional operations.
attributes.name: [IBM MQ OTel] Log filesystem critically low

investigation_guide.blob:
## IBM MQ log filesystem critically low

### What fired
Free space on the log filesystem dropped below 10% during the window.

### Why it matters
When the log fills up, MQ refuses all persistent operations. Recovery requires clearing old logs or extending the volume.

### Triage
1. Check circular vs linear log mode.
2. Inspect old log archival progress.

### Remediation
- Archive or remove old log extents.
- Grow the log filesystem.

### Tuning
- 10% is a late threshold. Consider a 25% warning rule.
